voices.name: Cowboy Bob // VF
voices.description: An aged American male voice, rich with the gravel of countless tales and tinged with a Southern drawl as comforting as a porch swing at dusk. voices.name: Rob - confident and formal
voices.description: A captivating voice with an authentic East Coast Scottish accent, perfectly tailored for male narration. Ideal for conveying depth and professionalism in a variety of contexts, especially suited for educational and formal content. Its rich tonality and distinctive Scottish inflection make it a compelling choice for engaging listeners in serious learning materials and authoritative presentations.

voices.name: Kris - Storyteller Kind Optimistic Hopeful
voices.description: Storyteller voice featuring an Adult American male voice with a charged energy and optimism to find out what's next, yet an easy listening, soft, passionate enthusiasm to bring stories to life. Great for varying styles: fiction, fantasy, adventure, children's stories, books, movies, pitches.  Truly for the romantic optimists - suitable for adults and children. American English, Educated, Artsy, Asian American adult speaker, hint of southern.
